name: Rat in a Maze
description: Consider a rat placed at (0, 0) in a square matrix of order n x n. The rat has to reach the destination at (n-1, n-1). Find all possible paths that the rat can take from source to destination. The rat can move up (U), down (D), left (L), right (R). Value 0 in a cell means the cell is blocked, value 1 means the rat can move through it. In a path, no cell can be visited more than once. Return sorted list of path strings.
constraints: 2 <= n <= 5. 0 <= maze[i][j] <= 1. If maze[0][0] = 0 or maze[n-1][n-1] = 0, return empty list.
python_template:
